positive: A clean, stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic roaring lion head, rendered in a sophisticated geometric neo-art deco style. The lion should be the central element, depicted against a deep sapphire blue and burnt orange color palette. Use clean lines, thick contrasting silhouettes, and negative space principles. Incorporate subtle vector patterns resembling tribal or stylized jungle foliage around the edges to frame the main subject. Studio lighting, high contrast, vector graphic quality, perfect for apparel print, centered composition, solid background color for easy cropping.
